metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Web Development 10 teaches students to design and build functional websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Students learn web design principles, front-end development, and how to create user-friendly web experiences. They explore responsive design, accessibility, and web standards while creating practical projects that combine design and technical skills.
metadata.general_description: Elective course focused on web design, front-end development, and creating functional websites.

big_ideas.statement: Web design and development require balancing aesthetics, functionality, accessibility, and user experience.
big_ideas.elaboration: Great websites are not just beautiful—they're also easy to use, fast to load, and accessible to diverse users. Students learn to think holistically about website design.

big_ideas.statement: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript work together to create the structure, style, and interactivity of web pages.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students learn that each language has a specific role: HTML provides structure, CSS controls appearance, and JavaScript enables interactivity. Understanding these layers helps create better websites.

big_ideas.statement: Responsive design ensures websites work well on all devices, from phones to desktop computers.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students learn that modern web development must account for many screen sizes and devices. Responsive design is not optional—it's essential.

big_ideas.statement: Websites are communication tools that must serve diverse users and be designed with accessibility, performance, and impact in mind.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students develop awareness that web design decisions affect who can access and use websites. Ethical web development considers diverse abilities, connectivity, and contexts.

competencies.raw: Apply design principles to web experiences
i_can_statements: I can apply design principles (balance, contrast, emphasis) to web layouts
I can create effective information hierarchies
I can design intuitive navigation structures
I can use color, typography, and visual elements effectively
I can design websites that work on multiple screen sizes
I can consider accessibility standards and diverse needs
I can design for readability and usability
I can test and refine designs for all users

competencies.raw: Plan website projects and user experiences
i_can_statements: I can define website goals and target audiences
I can create wireframes and prototypes
I can plan information architecture
I can document design decisions and specifications

competencies.raw: Design ethical and inclusive web experiences
i_can_statements: I can design for diverse abilities and needs
I can consider privacy and security in design
I can create inclusive content and interfaces
I can evaluate websites for ethical concerns

competencies.raw: Write semantic HTML and valid code
i_can_statements: I can write clean, semantic HTML
I can use HTML elements appropriately
I can validate HTML code
I can structure content meaningfully
I can use CSS selectors and properties effectively
I can create responsive layouts with flexbox and grid
I can style interactive elements and states
I can organize and maintain CSS efficiently
I can write JavaScript to add interactivity
I can manipulate the DOM and respond to events
I can validate forms and handle user input
I can debug and test JavaScript code
I can build complete website projects from design to launch
I can optimize website performance
I can deploy websites to hosting
I can maintain and update websites
I can understand how the web and HTTP work
I can understand web standards and best practices
I can use browser developer tools
I can troubleshoot web issues

competencies.raw: Use web development tools and frameworks
i_can_statements: I can use code editors and development environments
I can use version control for web projects
I can understand frameworks and libraries
I can work with build tools and bundlers

competencies.raw: Optimize websites for performance and SEO
i_can_statements: I can optimize images and assets
I can improve website performance
I can apply SEO best practices
I can monitor and analyze website metrics
I can understand APIs and integrate external services
I can work with databases and backend basics
I can understand cloud platforms and hosting
I can explore emerging web technologies

areas.name: Web Fundamentals and Design
topics: How the web works and HTTP protocols
Web design principles and user experience
